title.en: In this way, countless years passed.

content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to stay in the Arrow Mu Fortress to practice, and with that piece of the ultimate space-time ancient treasure fragment, he went all out to create the fourth form secret method.

At the same time, he also used many resources to improve his physical body and improve his cultivation little by little.

After all, it hasn't been long since he broke through to the Ancient Demon level, even if he comprehends the Ultimate Rule Realm, he still can't break through to the top Ancient Demon level, and he needs to raise his cultivation to the limit of the ordinary Ancient Demon level before he is qualified to impact the top Ancient Demon level realm.

Fortunately, he will not lack resources at all in a short period of time, at least before he raises his cultivation to the top ancient demon level realm, he does not need to worry about resources, and even when he reaches the top ancient demon level realm, he can also sell some precious resources to obtain the resources to improve his cultivation.

The harvest of the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm was enough for him to practice for countless years without worrying about resources.

In this way, countless years passed.

Under Ye Tian's protection, the life of the Dragon Disciple War Group was very comfortable, and occasionally encountered some troublesome tasks, Ye Tian would also help.

On this day, another top emperor of the Dragon Disciple Tribe broke through to the ancient demon level realm.

Of course.

The most improved strength belongs to the Eagle Ministry, Ye Tian often gives the Eagle Department some resources, so that the Eagle Department has more and more emperor levels.

Now, the Eagle Department has more than a hundred emperor ranks, and even the number of the Eagle tribe has increased hundreds of times, thanks to the fact that the treatment of the Eagle Department is getting better and better, and many people will make babies like crazy.

After all, Ye Tian initially came to this era, that is, in the Eagle Department, maybe this era is just a bubble of time and space, and in the end everything will turn into nothingness.

But he is in this era, this era is true to him, and the creatures in these time and space imprints also have their own emotions.

Therefore, Ye Tian naturally wanted to be kind to the Eagle Department.

Before you know it, many years of the Ancient Demon Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian laughed loudly in the retreat.

"Hahahaha, I finally created the fourth form secret method. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

This time, he succeeded in creating a form secret method containing the ultimate space-time particle, and thanks to that ultimate space-time ancient treasure fragment, it would have been difficult for him to create otherwise.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian cast this form, and his whole body seemed to become illusory, but the aura of the ultimate space-time particles was extremely strong.

Immediately after, he sends another replica body to attack this replica body!

Burst!

The sword light of Aromu pierced through the body, but it did not suffer any damage.

This effect is similar to the body of time and space, but if this form is only like this, then it is not worth Ye Tian's excitement.

Rumble!!!!

A force of ultimate space-time diffused and gradually turned into an ultimate realm, which was different from the Ultimate Rule Realm of Ten Thousand Laws, the power of this realm was completely composed of the ultimate space-time particles, and could be superimposed with the Ultimate Rule Realm of Ten Thousand Laws.

Under normal circumstances, an Ancient Demon level could only have one Ultimate Rule Domain, but Ye Tian had two Ultimate Rule Domains, which were the space-time rule realms attached to this form secret method.

"This form secret method is called the space-time form, and according to the space-time form I created, the first form is a space-time rule realm, once you cultivate to the second form, you can turn into two space-time rule realms, if you cultivate to the third form, it is three space-time rule realms. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that this space-time form is the most powerful form secret method he has created so far, and it is much more powerful than the Ten Thousand Law Form Secret Method, the Arrow Golden Body Form Secret Method, and the Arrow Arm Formation Secret Method, and it is undoubtedly the top form secret method.

However, it is not easy to cultivate the space-time form secret method, and ordinary resources are of little use to this form secret method, and it must be a treasure containing space-time particles to improve the space-time form secret method.

Fortunately, he had obtained a lot of resources containing space-time ultimate particles in the space-time ancient demon realm, and he could still use them for a period of time, if it was not enough, then use the battle points to exchange resources from the Arromu Fortress.

Immediately, he used these resources to improve the Space-Time Form Secret Method.

Wow!

A large amount of resources were swallowed into his body, and countless space-time particles were absorbed by his space-time secret form, gradually raising the space-time secret form.

The first form is small.

The first form is complete!

The first form is complete!

After that, Ye Tian began to attack the second form of the space-time form, and it was also very easy to break through.

And after the breakthrough of the second form of the space-time form, Ye Tian's mind moved, and two space-time rule realms appeared around him, which merged and superimposed with the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm, turning into three ultimate rule domains.

The terrifying three Ultimate Rule Realms, once applied to the enemy, were enough to cause terrifying suppression, and even with the power of the realm, they could directly smash the enemy's body and kill a group of ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses in seconds.

In the blink of an eye, a relatively long time has passed.

As a result, he exhausted the battle points accumulated over the long years, and exchanged a large amount of time and space resources from the Arrow Mu Fortress.

And during this period of time, he successfully created the third form of the space-time secret form, and then began to impact the third form, and it was still relatively easy to break through and succeed, and he became the third form of the space-time form, which also allowed him to have three space-time rule realms.

On the other hand.

Ye Tian had cultivated the Mystic Technique of Ten Thousand Laws Form, the Secret Technique of the Golden Body Form, and the Secret Technique of the Arm of the Arrow Form to the Third Form Dacheng Realm, and it was not very far from the Consummation Realm.

He can start creating the fourth form in the future, after all, once he cultivates the fourth form, his strength will be terrifyingly improved.

Of course.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm has also improved a lot, and he is not far from comprehending the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm.

After that, Ye Tian began to spend a lot of time improving the Ultimate Rule Realm, and as time passed, the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm improved little by little.

this day.

The Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm has reached the realm of Xiaocheng, which has also improved Ye Tian's strength.

Moreover, his cultivation was not too far from the limit of the ordinary ancient demon level.

If he could, Ye Tian wanted to continue cultivating silently like this, but this was impossible, because the time was not far from the battle of the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space.

When the time comes, the major main departments will desperately kill, and I don't know how many top ancient demon-level powerhouses will fall, and even the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses will fall!.
